title: Automated Processes Path
description: Build fluency in Automated Processes inside Machine Learning Frameworks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AutoML (Automated Machine Learning)
steps.summary: ** AutoML (Automated Machine Learning) belongs to the Machine Learning Frameworks area of AI/ML, within Automated Processes. It sits inside Machine Learning Frameworks / Automated Processes. Start after AutoML and Machine Learning. It opens into Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) Frameworks and Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) for Tabular Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
